data.description:
RED/GREEN task: create plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-dso-version.sh implementing the 3-tier version resolution chain.

Tier 1: read installed_plugins.json (host project's Claude per-project plugin-tracking file at ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json) — extract ref field for dso entry.
Tier 2: read ci.dso_plugin_version from .claude/dso-config.conf via read-config.sh.
Tier 3: read channels.dso[].source.ref from marketplace.json (located at $REPO_ROOT/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json or MARKETPLACE_JSON env override) — must use ONLY the 'dso' channel, never 'dso-dev'. Explicit error if channel entry is absent or malformed.

Security: validate resolved URL matches https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra.git — reject non-upstream refs with non-zero exit.

Outputs on success: two lines to stdout — 'version=<ref>' and 'tier=<1|2|3>'; INFO messages to stderr.
All-tiers-failure: exit non-zero with diagnostic naming which tier(s) failed and why.

Done criteria:
- Script exists at plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-dso-version.sh and is executable.
- Tier fallthrough works: if Tier 1 miss, tries Tier 2; if Tier 2 miss, tries Tier 3.
- Security check rejects non-navapbc URLs with exit 1 and stderr diagnostic.
- Tier 3 explicitly rejects absent/malformed dso channel (does NOT silently fall through or use dso-dev).
- All-tiers-failure exits non-zero with per-tier diagnostic.
data.title: feat: implement resolve-dso-version.sh 3-tier chain with security validation
